body_txt: Sometimes gravity doesn't work. Or doesn't work immediately. Or evenly. Or fairly . This takes the following forms:  The trope is named for a line from The Tick , riffing on the title of the novel The Moon Is a Harsh Mistress by Robert A. Heinlein , which is in turn a play on the sailors' saying "The sea is a harsh mistress" , which probably goes back to The Bible "The Law is a harsh master" ( Romans 7, 1-6). Compare Puff of Logic , another trope about how realizing something should happen causes it to happen. See also Gravity Is Only a Theory , Variable Terminal Velocity , Not the Fall That Kills You… , Gravity Sucks . Gravity as a "power" that is easy to create is covered by Artificial Gravity and Gravity Master .
